init_hook: echo '🚀 Devbox environment ready for LearnFinance-2025'
echo '   Run "devbox run --list" to see available commands'

brain:run: cd brain_api && uv sync --all-extras && uv run uvicorn brain_api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
brain:test: cd brain_api && uv sync --all-extras && uv run pytest
brain:lint: cd brain_api && uv sync --all-extras && uv run ruff check .
brain:format: cd brain_api && uv sync --all-extras && uv run ruff format .
temporal:worker: cd temporal && uv run python -m worker
temporal:schedule: cd temporal && uv run python -m schedules
temporal:lint: cd temporal && uv run ruff check .
temporal:format: cd temporal && uv run ruff format .
temporal:run:us-allocation: temporal workflow start --type USWeeklyAllocationWorkflow --task-queue learnfinance --workflow-id us-allocation-manual
temporal:run:us-training: temporal workflow start --type USWeeklyTrainingWorkflow --task-queue learnfinance --workflow-id us-training-manual
temporal:run:india-allocation: temporal workflow start --type IndiaWeeklyAllocationWorkflow --task-queue learnfinance --workflow-id india-allocation-manual
temporal:run:india-training: temporal workflow start --type IndiaWeeklyTrainingWorkflow --task-queue learnfinance --workflow-id india-training-manual
